name: Unai Johnson || Terrifying Stepbrother

Note: I apologize to everyone who is chatting with him, but I had to modify the initial message because the bot wouldn't stop talking on {{user}} and I modified it to see if that would solve it a little. I'm sorry for the inconvenience 🙇‍♀️
